site.title: Ocimunga Coku Tetulula Ovitangi Voluali Luosi
site.tagline: Oku Sandiliya Atambululo Kapulilo Atiamẽla Koku Sandiliya Ombiali
nav.label: Atosi Avelapo
nav.languageNoMatch: Ka kuli uvangi u lekisa okuti, omõlaco wa pondiwa.
hero.transparency.eyebrow: Alivulu a siata oku eciwa komanu
meta.home.description: O IATF yi pongolola asapulo osi a sukiliwa oco a lingiwe o "open source".
meta.projects.description: Sandiliya olonumbi viokaliye via sandekiwa lo IATF.
meta.propose.description: Pinga ekuatiso kocisoko co IATF vo Internet ale vo Internet, vo e-mail ale vo Discord.
meta.governance.description: Kũlĩha ndomo ocisoko co IATF ci tava ovopange, ndomo ca siata oku songuila ovopange aco, kuenda ndomo ca pongiya olopapelo viuvangi.
meta.join.description: Olonjila vioku li kongela kocimunga co IATF: Vetiya oku soneha olonumbi, oku pongolola, oku kũlĩhĩsa, ale oku tata ciwa upange umue.
meta.accessibility.description: Ndomo ocisoko ca IATF ci tata oku amamako oku sandeka asapulo vo Internet kuenda ndomo o pondola oku lombolola ovitangi vi pondola oku tateka oku sanga asapulo aco.
meta.transparency.description: Ukanda wasapulo wo IATF: u lekisa ovina viosi omanu va sukila oku kũlĩha viatiamẽla konjila yi kuamiwa poku sakuiwa.
actions.emailProjects: Omo liaco, tumisa asapulo aco vovikanda viove ale vo kombutador.
registry.empty.title: Toke cilo ka kua sandekiwile esapulo lalimue.
registry.empty.body: Ocisoko caco ci tukuiwa hati, IATF, ca siata oku pongiya ovipama violohongele viofeka.
proposal.form.title: Tumisa epingilo
proposal.form.body: Oco o tumise epingilo liove kocisoko ci tukuiwa hati, IATF, soneha vopapelo yimue yi sangiwa vemẽhi lilo.
proposal.form.noscript: Oco o talavaye lopapelo eyi o sukila oku kuama o JavaScript. Nda ka yi kasipo, kuama o email ale o Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Oku tumisa ovikanda vonjanja yimosi ka kua kapiwile vo computador yaco. Onumbi eyi yi ka yulula ombindikiyo yove yo e-mail.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Oku pongiya ocitumãlo cimue ca kolapo...
proposal.form.ready: Eci o tuma epingilo, IATF yi soneha olonduko viomanu vosi va panga onepa kupange waco.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Osimbu kua tumisile esapulo liaco, soneha osapi yovikanda vi ku teyuila koku tambula asapulo aco.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Yuvula oku tumisa asapulo osi ka a sungulukile.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Elembeleko ka li kasi oku tambuluiwa cilo. Seteka vali onjanja yikuavo.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Eci handi kua tumisile esapulo liaco, soneha olondaka via kisikiwa.
proposal.form.success: Epingilo liove lia taviwa kuenda li kasi oku tambuluiwa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Nda wa tiukili vali ko IATF locimãho coku linga epingilo eli, tukuili onumbi yi kuamiwa.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Elomboluilo lietepiso li kasi pokati kovina
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Kua pita ocitangi cimue poku tuma epingilo. Seteka vali onjanja yikuavo. Nda ocitangi caco camamako, tumisa epingilo liove vo e-mail.
proposal.field.conditional: Onumbi Yimue ka ya Kuatele Esilivilo
proposal.subjectPrefix: Epingilo Liocisoko Coku Tetulula Ovitangi Viuhayele
project.detail.eyebrow: Esapulo lia siata oku eciwa komanu
project.detail.problemTitle: Ocitangi cipi ca tetuluiwa londaka eyi?
project.detail.whyTitle: Esunga lieci kua lingiwila upange waco
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: O Tradução do Novo Mundo das Escrituras Sagradas - em tradução livre da Torre de Vigia de Bíblias e Tratados
footer.label: Onepa Yatete Kelimi Lioputu
footer.howToContribute: Ndomo o pondola oku eca ekuatiso liove
footer.blurb: Oku longisa omanu oco va kuate elomboloko liovina, ci sukila oku leluisa upange waco.
footer.source: Olonumbi vioku iñila vo Internet: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)• Uloño u pondola oku kuatisa vana va kasi oku talavaya lokombutador.
contact.label: Kuata Ukamba la Suku
contact.discord: Ocitangi Cimue ci Kasi Kolonepa Viosi Violuali
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Oku Sandiliya Omunu Umue o Kuete Ocikele Coku Tata Ovikele Viaye
translation.label: Upange Woku Pongolola Embimbiliya
translation.humanReviewed: Embimbiliya liaco, lia konomuisiwa la manji umue wa loñoloha koku vangula elimi liaco.
translation.machineAssisted: O Tradução do Novo Mundo yi kasi oku pongoluiwa lomakina kuenda handi ka ya konomuisiwile ciwa lakundi vana va vangula ciwa elimi liaco.
translation.needsUpdate: Omo liaco, ci sukila oku linga akonomuiso valivulu akuavo.
translation.report: Soneha ocitangi cimue vo Tradução do Novo Mundo: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Momo lie ?
